    Method ToStaticMeshBuilder

    ToStaticMeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM>(Scene, Converter<Material, TMaterial>, RuntimeOptions, Animation, float)

    Evaluates the current srcScene at a given animation and time and creates a static MeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS>

    Declaration
    public static MeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty> ToStaticMeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM>(this Scene srcScene, Converter<Material, TMaterial> materialFunc, RuntimeOptions options, Animation animation, float time) where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Scene srcScene

    The source Scene to evaluate.
    Converter<Material, TMaterial> materialFunc

    A function to convert Material into TMaterial.
    RuntimeOptions options

    Evaluation options.
    Animation animation

    The source Animation to evaluate.
    float time

    A time point, in seconds, within animation.
    Returns
    Type Description
    MeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty>

    A new MeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS> containing the evaluated geometry.
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TMaterial

    Any material type
    TvG

    A subtype of IVertexGeometry
    TvM

    A subtype of IVertexMaterial

    ToStaticMeshBuilder<TvG, TvM>(Scene, RuntimeOptions, Animation, float)

    Declaration
    public static MeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder, TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty> ToStaticMeshBuilder<TvG, TvM>(this Scene srcScene, RuntimeOptions options, Animation animation, float time) where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial
